name: Nocturne
subtitle: The Dark Hours
description: For the hours between midnight and dawn. Deer musk and aged oud folded into night-blooming jasmine, with a whisper of smoked vanilla. Wears close — like a secret against the skin.
bestFor: Evening, close encounters, speaking without words

name: Hierophant
subtitle: Bearer of Mysteries
description: Incense-laden and ritualistic. Frankincense and myrrh meet saffron and aged leather. Ancient — like stepping into a candlelit sanctuary where ceremonies have burned for millennia.
bestFor: Ritual, deep work, moments demanding gravity

name: Veridian
subtitle: The Green Hour
description: Crushed stems and dew-soaked petals. Galbanum and violet leaf open into iris butter and white florals, grounded by moss and earth. A garden just after rainfall.
bestFor: Day elegance, spring stirrings, ordinary poetry

name: Salt & Cedar
subtitle: Driftwood & Memory
description: Where forest meets sea. Salt-crusted cedar and driftwood ambergris, brightened by yuzu, anchored by Haitian vetiver. Clean but never sterile — alive with mineral depth.

name: Golden Oud
subtitle: The Gilded Path
description: Our magnum opus. Twenty-year-aged Cambodian oud threaded with saffron, honeyed dates, edible gold. Sweet, animalic, utterly intoxicating.
bestFor: When you mean to be remembered. Galas. Entrances.
